highlights.description: Canonical Transcript format for STT output with embedded JSON Schema
DurationMilliseconds type for JSON-friendly duration serialization

added.description: Canonical `Transcript` type in `stt` package for standardized STT output across providers
`TranscriptSegment` and `TranscriptWord` types with timing information
`TranscriptMetadata` for provenance (provider, model, options)
`NewTranscript()` constructor from `TranscriptionResult`
`LoadTranscript()` and `SaveJSON()` for file I/O
`TotalDuration()`, `SegmentDuration()`, `WordDuration()` convenience methods
`schema` package with embedded `TranscriptV1Schema` JSON Schema
Duration fields use `duration.DurationMilliseconds` for integer millisecond JSON serialization

tests.description: `TestNewTranscript` validates transcript creation from transcription results

highlights.description: New `resilience` package for provider-agnostic error classification and retry logic
Smart fallback in TTS and STT clients - only switch providers on permanent errors
8 error categories for actionable error handling decisions

added.description: `resilience` package with error categorization system
`ErrorCategory` type with 8 categories: transient, rate_limit, validation, auth, not_found, server, quota, unknown
`ErrorInfo` struct with category, retryability, code, message, suggestion, and retry-after hint
`ProviderError` type wrapping provider errors with classification metadata
`ErrorClassifier` interface for provider-specific error classification
`HTTPStatusClassifier` for HTTP status code classification
`Retry()` and `RetryWithResult[T]()` generic retry functions with configurable backoff
`RetryConfig` with max attempts, backoff strategy, classifier, and OnRetry callback
`RetryError` type for exhausted retry attempts with attempt count
Backoff strategies: `ExponentialBackoff`, `LinearBackoff`, `ConstantBackoff`, `NoBackoff`
`DefaultBackoff()` and `DefaultRetryConfig()` with sensible defaults
`IsProviderError()` helper to extract `ProviderError` from error chain
`IsRetryable()` helper to check error retryability

changed.description: TTS client now uses smart fallback - only switches providers on permanent (non-retryable) errors
STT client now uses smart fallback - only switches providers on permanent (non-retryable) errors
Fallback behavior is now determined by error classification, not error occurrence

tests.description: 44 tests in resilience package covering retry logic, backoff strategies, error types, and categories

highlights.description: Enhanced TTS mock fixtures with WAV audio generation
Provider-specific mocks for ElevenLabs, Deepgram, and OpenAI
Configurable mock behaviors for testing (latency, errors, timing)

added.description: `GenerateWAVFixture(durationMs, sampleRate)` creates valid WAV files with proper RIFF headers for testing
`GenerateShortWAV()` and `GenerateOneSecondWAV()` convenience fixtures
`MockProviderOption` functional options pattern for configurable mock behavior
`WithFixedDuration(ms)` option for mocks returning fixed-length audio
`WithRealisticTiming()` option for text-length-proportional audio duration
`WithError(err)` option for error injection testing
`WithLatency(duration)` option for simulating network delays
`WithFailAfterN(n, err)` option for testing retry/failover logic
`NewElevenLabsMock()` with 3 preconfigured voices (Rachel, Bella, Antoni)
`NewDeepgramMock()` with 3 preconfigured voices (Asteria, Luna, Orion)
`NewOpenAIMock()` with 6 preconfigured voices (Alloy, Echo, Fable, Onyx, Nova, Shimmer)
Common test errors: `ErrMockRateLimit`, `ErrMockQuotaExceeded`, `ErrMockNetworkError`, `ErrMockInvalidVoice`

tests.description: Comprehensive tests for WAV fixture generation and header validation
Tests for all MockProviderOption behaviors including context cancellation
Provider conformance tests for ElevenLabs, Deepgram, and OpenAI mocks

fixed.description: Fixed gofmt formatting and added G115 nolint annotations for bounded integer conversions in WAV generation

documentation.description: Testing with Mocks guide covering mock providers, WAV fixtures, and common test patterns

highlights.description: Observability package for voice instrumentation with hooks and events
Registry package for provider discovery and registration
CallSystem client with multi-provider failover support
SMS messaging support via SMSProvider interface

added.description: `observability` package with VoiceEvent, VoiceObserver, TTSHook, and STTHook interfaces
Event types for call lifecycle (initiated, ringing, answered, ended, failed)
NoOpTTSHook and NoOpSTTHook for optional instrumentation
`registry` package with Registry interface for provider discovery
Factory types for TTS, STT, and CallSystem providers
`callsystem.Client` for managing multiple CallSystem providers with automatic failover
`SMSProvider` interface and `SMSMessage` type for SMS support
`Hook` field in `SynthesisConfig` for TTS observability
`Hook` field in `TranscriptionConfig` for STT observability
`Observer` field in `CallSystemConfig` and `CallOptions` for call events
`WithObserver` CallOption for per-call observability
`ObservableCallSystem` interface combining CallSystem with Observable
`SetHook()` and `Hook()` methods on TTS and STT clients

fixed.description: Resolved gosec G120 warnings in Twilio webhook example by adding http.MaxBytesReader

highlights.description: Organization rename from agentplexus to plexusone

changed.description: **Breaking**: Go module path changed from `github.com/agentplexus/omnivoice` to `github.com/plexusone/omnivoice-core`

highlights.description: Comprehensive tests for English and Chinese subtitle generation
Fixed subtitle word cutoff at line boundaries

fixed.description: Subtitle cue chunking now checks actual wrapped line count instead of total character count, preventing words from being cut off when they would appear on a third line

tests.description: `TestWordsToSubtitleCues_LineCountLimit` verifies cues split correctly at line boundaries

highlights.description: STT conformance tests for `TranscribeFile` and `TranscribeURL` batch transcription methods

tests.description: `TranscribeFile` conformance test for local file transcription
`TranscribeURL` conformance test for remote URL transcription

highlights.description: Subtitle generation from STT transcription results
Extensible config maps for provider-specific settings

added.description: Subtitle package for SRT/VTT generation from transcription results
Configurable max characters per line and lines per cue for subtitles
Word-level timestamp-based cue splitting
`Extensions` map in `TranscriptionConfig` for provider-specific STT settings
`Extensions` map in `SynthesisConfig` for provider-specific TTS settings

fixed.description: Subtitle `wrapText` no longer clips words when text exceeds line limit

documentation.description: Voice cloning guide with recording tips and phonetically balanced text

highlights.description: Provider conformance test suites for TTS and STT implementations

added.description: TTS provider conformance test suite (`Synthesize`, `SynthesizeStream`, `SynthesizeFromReader`)
Mock TTS provider for self-testing with configurable audio format responses
STT provider conformance test suite (`Transcribe`, `TranscribeStream`)
Mock STT provider with streaming transcription simulation

fixed.description: MCP session and tool handlers now log `Close()` errors instead of discarding

documentation.description: Provider conformance testing TRD describing test categories and API design

highlights.description: Audio codec package with PCM, mu-law, and a-law support for telephony
MCP server enabling Claude Code to make voice calls
Pipeline components connecting STT, TTS, and transport providers

added.description: Audio codec package with PCM sample conversions (int16, float32, float64, bytes)
Mu-law encoding/decoding for Twilio Media Streams
A-law encoding/decoding for international telephony
Audio resampling, normalization, and analysis utilities
MCP server with stdio transport for voice interactions
Voice interaction tools: `initiate_call`, `continue_call`, `speak_to_user`, `end_call`
Session management for tracking active voice calls
`TTSPipeline` for streaming TTS output to transport connections
`StreamingTTSPipeline` for connecting streaming LLM text to TTS to transport
`STTPipeline` for streaming audio from transport to STT with event callbacks

documentation.description: Voice integration PRD outlining goals, user stories, and success metrics
Twilio integration TRD detailing Media Streams architecture

tests.description: Comprehensive unit tests for audio codec functions (mu-law, a-law, PCM)

highlights.description: Initial OmniVoice voice abstraction layer for multi-provider telephony

added.description: Voice abstraction layer with provider-agnostic interfaces
STT (speech-to-text) provider interface with streaming support
TTS (text-to-speech) provider interface with streaming support
Transport interface for audio connections (Twilio, Zoom, etc.)
Export `CallOptions` for provider implementations
